scripts.dev:desktop: bun run --filter @openslaq/api dev & bun run --filter @openslaq/desktop dev
scripts.dev:mobile: bun run --filter @openslaq/api dev & bun run --filter @openslaq/mobile dev
scripts.dev:stop: kill $(cat .dev.pid) 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3000 -i :3001 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; rm -f .dev.pid && echo 'Stopped'
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.coverage:api:
bun run --filter @openslaq/api-e2e test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text && awk 'BEGIN{in_api=0;lf=lh=fnf=fnh=0} /^SF:/{in_api=($0 ~ /\.\./api/src//)} in_api && /^LF:/{lf+=substr($0,4)} in_api && /^LH:/{lh+=substr($0,4)} in_api && /^FNF:/{fnf+=substr($0,5)} in_api && /^FNH:/{fnh+=substr($0,5)} END{printf("apps/api line coverage: %.2f%% (%d/%d)
", (lf?100*lh/lf:0), lh, lf); printf("apps/api function coverage: %.2f%% (%d/%d)
", (fnf?100*fnh/fnf:0), fnh, fnf)}' apps/api-e2e/coverage/lcov.info && echo 'Top 5 files by missing covered lines (apps/api/src):' && awk 'BEGIN{in_api=0;f="";lines=""} function flush(){if(in_api && f!="") print miss+0 "	" f "	" lines} /^SF:/{flush(); f=substr($0,4); in_api=(f ~ /\.\./api/src//); miss=0; lines=""} in_api && /^DA:/{split(substr($0,4), a, ","); if (a[2]==0) {miss++; lines = lines (lines=="" ? "" : ",") a[1]}} END{flush()}' apps/api-e2e/coverage/lcov.info | sort -nr | head -5 | awk -F '	' '{printf("%s missing lines | %s | lines: %s
", $1, $2, ($3=="" ? "none" : $3))}'
scripts.coverage:web:
rm -rf apps/web-e2e/coverage-raw apps/web-e2e/coverage && CI=true VITE_COVERAGE=true bun run --filter @openslaq/web-e2e test && cd apps/web-e2e && bun x nyc report --temp-dir $PWD/coverage-raw --report-dir $PWD/coverage --cwd ../.. --reporter lcov --reporter text && cd ../.. && awk 'BEGIN{lf=lh=fnf=fnh=0} /^SF:/{in_web=($0 ~ /web/src//)} in_web && /^LF:/{lf+=substr($0,4)} in_web && /^LH:/{lh+=substr($0,4)} in_web && /^FNF:/{fnf+=substr($0,5)} in_web && /^FNH:/{fnh+=substr($0,5)} END{printf("apps/web line coverage: %.2f%% (%d/%d)
", (lf?100*lh/lf:0), lh, lf); printf("apps/web function coverage: %.2f%% (%d/%d)
", (fnf?100*fnh/fnf:0), fnh, fnf)}' apps/web-e2e/coverage/lcov.info && echo 'Top 5 files by missing covered lines (apps/web/src):' && awk 'BEGIN{f="";lines=""} function flush(){if(in_web && f!="") print miss+0 "	" f "	" lines} /^SF:/{flush(); f=substr($0,4); in_web=(f ~ /web/src//); miss=0; lines=""} in_web && /^DA:/{split(substr($0,4), a, ","); if (a[2]==0) {miss++; lines = lines (lines=="" ? "" : ",") a[1]}} END{flush()}' apps/web-e2e/coverage/lcov.info | sort -nr | head -5 | awk -F '	' '{printf("%s missing lines | %s | lines: %s
", $1, $2, ($3=="" ? "none" : $3))}'
